summary: Completed testing of Training Completion feature. Backend: 11/11 tests pass. All training completion endpoints work correctly. Frontend: Training completion dialog works, duplicate prevention works. Minor UI issue: ComplianceOverview component shows 'Complete' button + 'Missing' badge for some items that are already completed in backend.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Complete' button AND 'Missing' badge for training items that are already completed in backend (e.g., Basic Life Support, Induction). The component's internal matching logic may not be finding training records correctly.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/employees/{id}/training-requirements returns all training requirements with status
Backend: POST /api/employees/{id}/complete-training marks training as complete
Backend: Duplicate prevention - returns 'already_completed' for completed training
Backend: Compliance score includes training requirements
Backend: No duplicate training records created
Backend: Training completion with expiry date works
Backend: Training completion updates employee compliance percentage
Frontend: Employee profile loads with compliance data
Frontend: Training & Compliance Overview component renders
Frontend: 'Complete' buttons appear for missing training items
Frontend: Training completion dialog opens with correct data
Frontend: Dialog shows training name, category, expiry date input
Frontend: 'Mark Complete' button triggers API call
Frontend: Toast notification shows success/already completed message
Frontend: Training tab shows all 6 training records as completed
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix ComplianceOverview component's training record matching logic to correctly identify completed training items
critical_code_review_comments: ComplianceOverview component uses different matching logic than backend - may cause UI inconsistency where items show as 'Missing' in overview but are actually completed
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee Olakunle Alonge (id: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77). All 6 training requirements are completed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training completion feature fully implemented and working. Backend endpoints: POST /api/employees/{id}/complete-training and GET /api/employees/{id}/training-requirements work correctly. Duplicate prevention works - backend returns 'already_completed' action. Minor UI issue in ComplianceOverview component where some completed training items show both 'Complete' button and 'Missing' badge. This is a display-only issue - the actual training completion works correctly.
